data.content:
Shipment review sign-off.

Live on origin/main:
- 0a483446 (merge commit, tagged)
- 199e7c4a (typecheck fix for smoke test, tagged)
- d569c4f8 (main implementation, tagged)
- branch:worktree-foolery-a01f-opencode-render (preserved on remote, tagged)

CI/CD: both 'CI' and 'Coverage Badge' workflows completed with status success on the merge commit.

Invariants confirmed in shipped code:
- kno workflows untouched. No synthetic transitions or post-processing in TS.
- File length: opencode-http-session.ts 402 lines; opencode-event-translate.ts 370 lines; opencode-event-format.ts 142 lines; all under 500.
- Hermetic tests: every new test file imports only pure TS modules; no fetch/process.env/fs/spawn/host-binary calls.
- No silent fallbacks: translateOpenCodePart and translateOpenCodeEvent are exhaustive over their named handler set; unknown types return [] explicitly. createOpenCodeNormalizer returns null for non-objects and unknown types.
- Backward compatibility: pre-existing OpenCode tests (opencode-interactive-session.test.ts, opencode-http-session-approvals.test.ts, opencode-model-selection.test.ts) all still pass without modification.

No regressions detected in dependent systems.
